title: Publicly shared board conversations
excerpt: I am starting to use public URL sharing for boards, but I really need to be able for the viewer to see the conversations also to see the history of the project, rather than just being able to see a small text box… please…

posts.author: pm813 (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml: I am starting to use public URL sharing for boards, but I really need to be able for the viewer to see the conversations also to see the history of the project, rather than just being able to see a small text box… please add this feature!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @pm813 ,
If the problem is still relevant to you, there’s Board Email Reports app that can help you. It has a set of reports for item updates:

image2047×675 83.5 KB

You will see the following types of reports:

  • Updates written by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates (show all the updates over a period in a descending order)

The app consolidates item updates over a specific period and automatically delivers them via email with a roundup of changes and detailed xls-report as an attachment. This is how it looks:

image424×469 24.9 KB

The best part is that you don’t need to add users as guests to your monday account, just add their emails into the automation rule.
You can test the app for free and find out if it works for you. We can make a custom automation rule, just tell your request to our team.
